{{CargoOrgan
|name=Beak of the Sky
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10704
|idx=62
|description="It shrieked from the heavens like divine retribution, plunging from the skies above. No prey has ever escaped its hunt!" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=Awaken Eagle, dealing DMG equal to 196% of ATK, and launch an airstrike to deal DMG equal to 24% of ATK!
|hp=2480
|def=350
|atk=257
|rush=215
|gene1=Per red organ implanted, {race} ATK +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene2=Per red organ implanted, {race} RUSH +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene3=Per red organ implanted, {race} DEF +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene4={race} ATK +14 per 5 Shrine Flying Object shot down
Shrine flying objects shot: 100/100
|gene5=When enemy life is above 50%, DMG dealt +10%
|gene6=Ignore DEF +2%
|gene7=Ignore DEF +2% (Awakened)
|}}
